notFound.title: Trail Not Found
notFound.message: This trail hasn't been explored yet. Let's head back to camp.

cookie.message: We use cookies to enhance your experience.

hero.tagline: Between Mountains & Sea — Set Your Soul Free
hero.heroImageAlt: Outdoor river valley camping scene surrounded by mountains and water

philosophy.title:
In nature,
find your true self.
philosophy.body1: We believe the most profound experiences come between mountains and sea. Each journey is a dialogue with nature — in the vastness of sky and earth, shed the weight of the city and feel the rhythm of life once more.
philosophy.body2: See You Wild is not just outdoor adventure, but a journey of the soul set free. We meticulously craft every detail so you find your own rhythm between wildness and grace.

safety.title: Safety First
safety.desc: Every guide holds professional certifications with regular training and equipment maintenance, so you can enjoy every moment with peace of mind.

experience.title: Deep Experiences
experience.desc: We don't follow tourist routes. Every trail is scouted firsthand to show you Taiwan's most pristine beauty.

quality.title: Quality in Details
quality.desc: From pre-trip preparation to post-adventure photo records, every detail is polished to leave you with memories worth treasuring.

ava.quote: The moment I looked up at the stars from the wild hot spring, I knew this is what life should feel like.
ava.author: Ava L.

james.quote: The private chef's dishes taste completely different in the wilderness — every bite was pure happiness. The team took care of every detail, worry-free.
james.author: James K.

mei.quote: Paddling out on the SUP at sunrise, the ocean was like a mirror. The most peaceful moment I've ever experienced.
mei.author: Mei W.

chris.quote: Tree climbing gave me an entirely new perspective on the forest. The world in the canopy is absolutely breathtaking.
chris.author: Chris T.

sophie.quote: I thought it was just regular camping, but it turned out to be a complete sensory experience. Already booked the next one!
sophie.author: Sophie C.

david.quote: River tracing was both challenging and full of surprises. The coaches were incredibly professional, letting us enjoy every moment with confidence.
david.author: David H.

cta.title: begin your journey
cta.description: Discover our curated expeditions and find the journey that best elevates your wild experience.
cta.imageAlt: Wilderness camp scene looking out from tent into forest

camping-chef.title: Wild Camp Chef — Private Dining
camping-chef.subtitle: Campfire Dinner × SUP × Tree Climbing
camping-chef.description: Enjoy private chef cuisine under the stars, challenge SUP paddleboarding and tree climbing by day. Limited seats for your exclusive glamping experience.
camping-chef.imageAlt: Night campfire dinner tent scene with string lights creating a cozy atmosphere

hot-spring.title: Hidden Wild Hot Springs
hot-spring.subtitle: Professional Guides & Safety Escort
hot-spring.description: Led by professional guides, explore Taiwan's hidden wild hot springs. With safety escorts and professional gear, enjoy nature's hot spring feast with peace of mind.
hot-spring.imageAlt: Wild hot spring scene with natural springs emerging between rocks and streams

contact.heading: Follow Us
contact.description: Follow our Instagram for the latest event updates
